title: Kadhal Kan Kattudhe Lyrics Kaaki Sattai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kadhal Kan Kattudhe Lyrics from KaakiSattai Movie
Singer(s): ShakthiShree, Anirudh
click here for English meaning

Kadhal kan kattudhey
Kavidhai pesi Kai thattudhey

Aasai mull kuththudhey
Arugil ponaal thaen sottudhey

Paravayaai thirindhaval
Iragu pol tharayile
Vilugiren.

Iravilum pagalilum
Thodarum un ninaivile
Karaigiren.

Kaattru neeyaaga veesa
En dhegam kooda
Edhai naan pesa

Kalaindhu ponaane
Kanavugal urasa.
Pariththu ponaaye
Ivaladhu manasa.

Irul pole irundhene
Vilakkaaga unardhene
Unnai naane.

Paarvai konjam pesudhu
Paruvam konjam pesudhu
Badhilai edhai pesida
Theriyamal naan.

Koocham konjam ketkudhu
Yaekkam konjam ketkudhu
Uyire unnai ketida
Tharuvene naan.

Anbe anbae mazhayum neethaane
Anbe anbe veyilum neethaane

Oru vaarthai unai katta
Maru vaarthai enai meeta
Vilundhene.

Kadhal kan kattudhey
Kavidhai pesi Kai thattudhey

Aasai mull kuththudhey
Arugil ponaal thaen sottudhey

Paravayaai thirindhaval
Iragu pol tharayile
Vilugiren.

Iravilum pagalilum
Thodarum un ninaivile
Karaigiren.

Kaattru neeyaaga veesa
En dhegam kooda
Edhai naan pesa

Kalaindhu ponaane
Kanavugal urasa.
Pariththu ponaaye
Ivaladhu manasa.

Irul pole irundhene
Vilakkaaga unardhene
Unnai naane.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Kan Kattudhe?

The song revolves around the theme of love and romance, capturing the emotions of falling in love.

Who are the singers of this song?

Anirudh and Shakthisree Gopalan have lent their voices to this beautiful duet.

What role does this song play in the movie Kaaki Sattai?

The song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music was composed by the talented Anirudh.

When was Kadhal Kan Kattudhe released?

The song was released on December 13, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Kaaki Sattai, Kadhal Kan Kattudhe beautifully captures the essence of budding romance between the lead characters. The song, with its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi, conveys the joy and excitement of falling in love. Anirudh's composition, combined with the soulful voices of Anirudh and Shakthisree Gopalan, evokes a sense of happiness and warmth. This romantic duet is perfect for moments of love and connection, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Kadhal Kan Kattudhe from the movie Kaaki Sattai, where Anirudh's mesmerizing tunes meet Shakthisree Gopalan's soulful voice. This romantic duet captures the essence of love with its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi. Dive into a world of emotions with this beautiful composition that promises to leave you spellbound.
stanzaMeanings: Love blinds me, speaks poetry, claps hands.
Desire pricks like a thorn, when you come near, it melts like honey.
She who flew like a bird, I fall to the ground like a feather.
Day and night, your thoughts continue, I melt away.
The wind blows like you, even my body doesn't know what to say.
He faded away, dreams embraced him. She left, her heart shattered.
I was in darkness, realized you are the light, you are mine.
A glance speaks a little, youth speaks a little, I don't know what to say in response.
A little shyness asks, a little longing asks, if life asks for you, I will give it.
Love, you are the rain, love, you are the sunshine.
One word binds you, another word lifts me, I fell.
Love blinds me, speaks poetry, claps hands.
Desire pricks like a thorn, when you come near, it melts like honey.
She who flew like a bird, I fall to the ground like a feather.
Day and night, your thoughts continue, I melt away.
The wind blows like you, even my body doesn't know what to say.
He faded away, dreams embraced him. She left, her heart shattered.
I was in darkness, realized you are the light, you are mine.
